title: Quick F3
description: An overlay that shows the FPS and player coordinates in realtime
body:
# About:
An overlay that shows FPS and Coordinates in realtime; while being lighter than the F3 menu.

# Controls:
- **F4**: toggles the overlay.
- **Left Alt**: toggles the modes of the overlay:

## Available modes:
1. Show FPS and Coordinates.(Default)
2. Show FPS only.
3. Show Coordinates only.

_when F3 menu opened, the overlay is automatically hidden._
